sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sqid (id UInt64, sqid String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, sqid, sqidDecode(sqid) AS decoded_values FROM test_sqid WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_sqid SET sqid = 'gXHfJ1C6dNabcd' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, sqid, sqidDecode(sqid) AS decoded_values FROM test_sqid WHERE decoded_values IS NOT NULL;
